hero.title: Clément Daguenet
hero.subtitle: Full-Stack Developer
hero.hook: Master's student at MyDigitalSchool Angers and apprentice developer at Microtec in Le Mans, I build modern, reliable and polished web applications. Based between Le Mans and Angers, I am looking for a permanent role at the end of my Master's for october 2026.
hero.location: Le Mans / Angers · Seeking permanent role · End of Master's
